title: Iran war lands 'triple blow' to flood-ravaged Sri Lankans
summary_full: The Iran war could not have come at a worse time for Sri Lanka, reeling from devastating floods and an economic crisis.
summary_public: The Iran war could not have come at a worse time for Sri Lanka, reeling from devastating floods and an economic crisis.
